commit_scope: Broaden the native HTTP feature surface so common protocol traffic can enter the Form router without endpoint-specific special cases.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Public deploy verification is pending until merge/deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Native HTTP routing now welcomes a broader common protocol surface: case-insensitive header lookup, HEAD and OPTIONS method validation, low-pressure HEAD-through-GET selection, no-body HEAD responses, and generic no-body OPTIONS discovery when no native route/upstream handles it.
test_flows: kernel-http-band proves header case matching, HEAD-through-GET route pressure, OPTIONS request validity, route-choice signatures, and candidate scoring
http-request-band proves parsed headers can be found case-insensitively
http-server-band proves HEAD no-body wire response, required-header casing, and unmatched OPTIONS 204 + Allow
binary validation proves the behavior survives Form artifact compilation
Rust tests prove compatibility listener validation/scoring and buffered HEAD body suppression
